rebuilder_1.name: Payment Plaza
rebuilder_1.title: PAYMENT PLAN PLAZA
lesson: A payment plan splits debt into steady chunks.
Pay on time so no extra fees pile up.
Each payment shrinks what you owe.

rebuilder_2.name: Interest Lab
rebuilder_2.title: INTEREST IMPACT LAB
rebuilder_2.hint: Tilt ◀ ▶ to keep the 📈 interest meter centered
lesson: Interest is the extra cost of borrowing money.
Low interest means debt grows slower.
Paying early cuts the interest you owe.

rebuilder_3.name: Rebuild Station
rebuilder_3.title: REBUILDING STATION
rebuilder_3.hint: TAP to drop each block and stack your health high
lesson: Rebuild credit one good habit at a time.
On-time payments slowly raise your score.
Keep balances low to stay financially strong.

rebuilder_4.name: Habit Reset
rebuilder_4.title: HABIT RESET CENTER
lesson: Small habits repeated build big results.
A budget tells your money where to go.
Skip impulse buys to keep debt away.

qs.q: Best habit to avoid new debt?

rebuilder_5.name: Fitness Gym
rebuilder_5.title: FINANCIAL FITNESS GYM
rebuilder_5.hint: Move ◀ ▶ to catch good habits, dodge bad ones
lesson: Good money habits get stronger with practice.
Saving a little often beats spending it all.
Paying bills on time keeps you fit and fee-free.

rebuilder_6.name: Resilience Hall
rebuilder_6.title: RESILIENCE HALL
rebuilder_6.hint: SWIPE each item to GOOD DEBT or BAD DEBT
lesson: Good debt can build your future, like a student loan.
Bad debt buys things that lose value fast.
Knowing the difference makes you debt-resilient.
